photo.credit: NASA · Apollo 11 (Jul 1969) — Buzz Aldrin on the lunar surface in the A7L suit. Armstrong + the LM are reflected in the gold visor.

see_in_app.context_key: Apollo 11–17 (A7L / A7LB suits) and the upcoming Artemis III (AxEMU) — the only lunar EVAs in history
